title: carex oederi subsp. demissa
intro: Carex oederi subsp. demissa, also known as Oeder's sedge or Carex oederi, is a type of sedge plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carex oederi subsp. demissa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
